name: FakeItEasy
description: Easy-to-use .NET mocking library focused on a single A.FakeT() API and natural fluent assertions on calls.

seo.title: FakeItEasy — Test Automation / Device Cloud
seo.meta_description: FakeItEasy: Easy-to-use .NET mocking library focused on a single A.FakeT() API and natural fluent assertions on calls.

when_to_use: Simple .NET faking API with A.FakeT() pattern
Fluent call verification without record/replay phases
Partial fakes for legacy class isolation in .NET tests
Readable test assertions with MustHaveHappened syntax

pros: Natural fluent assertions on calls made
Plays nicely with xUnit and NUnit
Less ceremony than Moq for simple cases
cons: Smaller community than Moq or NSubstitute
review.verdict: Clean, underrated .NET mocking library, worth a look when Moq feels overly ceremonial.
review.best_for: .NET teams wanting ergonomic mocks without Moq verbosity
review.not_for: Shops already invested in Moq or NSubstitute with no pain
